query:
SELECT 
  pt.id,
  pt.address,
  pt.videoMode,
  pt.videoUrl,
  pt.status
FROM property_tours pt
JOIN users u ON pt.userId = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'rdshop70@gmail.com'
  AND pt.status = 'completed'
  AND pt.videoUrl IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY pt.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
